name: Corn Crusted Beef Tournedoes with Roasted Corn Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 ears of fresh shucked corn (about 1 1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Heat 1 teaspoon olive oil in a saute pan.
3. Saute the corn and shallots for 3 minutes. Remove half of the corn mixture and place it in a small bowl.
4. Continue cooking the remaining corn mixture for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until it begins to brown and caramelize.
5. Add the tomatoes and stock to the pan. Turn the heat to low and allow to simmer for 5 minutes.
6. In the small bowl with the removed corn mixture, add the Parmesan cheese and butter. Season well and set aside.
7. In a small saute pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil until very hot. Season the beef and sear on one side for 2 minutes. Flip and coat each beef tournedo with the corn mixture. Place in the oven for an additional 3 minutes.
8. Add the remaining butter to the sauce and season. Remove the meat from the oven, place on a serving plate, and top with the sauce.
9. Garnish with red bell peppers, green onions, and grated Parmesan cheese.
Yield: 2 servings
